# Matthew's Musings

> Essays by Matthew Prahl about early Christianity, process theology, humanity in the age of AI, and related subjects.

Canonical site: https://essays.mprahl.com/

## Articles

- [God's Kingdom Already Present](https://essays.mprahl.com/essays/kingdom-of-god-essay.html)
  A historical argument that Jesus proclaimed God's kingdom primarily as a present, collaborative, nonviolent transformation rather than an imminent apocalypse.

- [God's Kingdom Already Present (Short Version)](https://essays.mprahl.com/essays/kingdom-of-god-short-essay.html)
  A concise historical case that Jesus proclaimed God's kingdom as a present transformation centered on healing, shared meals, social reversal, and justice.

- [Process Theology Quiz](https://essays.mprahl.com/essays/process-theology-quiz.html)
  An active-recall quiz on process theology, including divine dipolarity, actual occasions, prehension, freedom, evil, immortality, and religious language.

- [How to Read Cobb and Griffin's Process Theology as a Beginner](https://essays.mprahl.com/essays/how-to-read-cobb-process-theology.html)
  A beginner's guide to the Whiteheadian concepts needed to read Cobb and Griffin's Process Theology, explained in concrete and accessible language.
